a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Average years of formal education for individuals aged 15-64.
Data source: Barro and Lee (2015); Lee and Lee (2016)

Note: Formal education is
primary
/ISCED 1 or higher. This does not include years spent repeating grades. Data for the years before 2015 are
estimates, while data from 2015 onwards are projections.
